title: Regent Round Multi-Purpose Jar Gripper Pad Bottle Lid Opener, 4 Piece Set, Colors May Vary
description:
About this item
Set of 4 Jar Gripper Pads
Assorted Colors ( 1 color for all 4 pads)
Multi-purpose grippers and opens jar lids & caps
5.5 inches round in size
reviews_5s: They are easy to use and help you open most jars etcI found 2 items that i needed one was rubber soft hand grips to use to open items or unscrew items when my hands don’t work and Handicap See through plastic holder for traveling or use in vehicle when i needed it.Replaced an older gripper that finally died. Use for jar opening and grippyness is great.I purchased these for my mom because her hands are very weak. She is able to open anything now. Highly recommend.Great!These really are handy. And they work. I'm almost 50 and my mum almost 70. We are starting to have trouble opening lids. They feel flimsy quality but have worked well for us. Good value for priceThese little items seem a little out of place- until you can’t loosen a lid to save your neck. These things work and are invaluable when some product has a lid wa too tight. They aren’t expensive and are worth it. You can buy something more expensive but why do that when this simple device works just fine.These little grippers come in handy when dealing with a tightly shut jar. The last jar these buggers opened was a persistently annoying jar of sweet relish, whose lid I did not relish. This lid was no match for a jar gripper, and this second purchase is a replacement of my first in 2020, as these do wear out.I use in kitchen. Useful.These work so well
reviews_1s: This is no way a gripper, it does not work and is better as a coaster, no grip whatsoever!!!!LOUSY CONSTRUCTIONThese openers are terribly small and are only good for opening water bottles With small caps! For the price .quality is not good.. they are also physically thin And makes it very hard to get a grip on a large cap of a jarNot rubber at all. made of some weird foam. It shreds with most items. This leaves tiny foam shreds potentially in the food or time you are opening. Pay the extra money for a real rubber gripper or something else. Returning for a refund.Doesn’t grip anything like the one I threw away. I got it out of the trash and will continue using what’s left of it. What a waste of money!I had high hopes for the grippers. I would’ve loved to have given 4 or 5 stars but the grip was weak and did little to loosen anything. Too bad. I ended up using a rubber glove.I normally don’t write reviews but I would give these a negative star if possible. Every single time I use mine 4-5 of the green grips fall off on the counter. They are now useless.Simply does not do the job. It has a plastic feel with holes. I tried to open a medium jar of sauce with it and could not open the jar. Another member of the family tried and could not open the jar. I have used rubber jar openers for many years. This is a joke!The product shreds apart after a couple of usesCheap and doesn’t work. Would not recommend.
